steps.title: Identify what outweighed credentials
steps.content: The passage says doctors' credentialed status was 'outweighed' by participants' views of experiential relevance — the personal trial experience that volunteers had but doctors lacked.

steps.title: Match the outweighed factor
steps.content: Choice D directly states that volunteers' shared trial experience was more important to participants than doctors' credentials. The others either focus on participants' evaluation ability (A), message tone (B), or mischaracterize messenger experience (C). That matches choice D — D is correct.
